title: paeonia peregrina
intro: Paeonia peregrina, also known as the Chinese peony, is a plant species in the genus Paeonia that is native to China. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Paeonia peregrina include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to help manage menstrual cramps and other gynecological problems. In herbal preparations, Paeonia peregrina is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used as a dried root or powder in supplement form.
